name: Ziti Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta, reducing cooking time by 5 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, sauté the beef and onions until the beef is well browned. Use two large skillets or brown half at a time.
3. Add mushrooms and garlic to the skillet and cook for 3 minutes.
4. Drain the ziti.
5. Combine the meat mixture, sauce, wine, oregano, salt, and pepper in a large bowl.
6. Add the drained ziti and mix well.
7. Pour the mixture into two greased 13 x 9 inch baking dishes.
8. Sprinkle with shredded mozzarella cheese.
9. Cover with foil.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 35-40 minutes.
11. Serve with sour cream.
